query:
UPDATE users 
SET stripeConnectAccountId = CONCAT('acct_test_', REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(email, '@', 1), '.', '_')),
    stripeConnectOnboarded = true
WHERE email IN ('elena.petrov@example.com', 'carlos.rodriguez@example.com', 'sarah.chen@example.com');
